name: aos-harness
description: CLI-first Codex plugin for running AOS Harness workflows from this repository.

interface.shortDescription: Run AOS Harness CLI workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin for initializing, running, validating, listing, scaffolding, and replaying AOS Harness workflows through the local Bun CLI.
defaultPrompt: List the available AOS profiles, domains, and briefs.
Run a strategic-council dry-run on a local brief.
Scaffold a new AOS agent, profile, domain, or skill.
